title: Goodenia genuflexa
taxonomy: Goodenia genuflexa is classified in the family Goodeniaceae, which is a family of flowering plants native to Australia. This family is part of the larger order Asterales, which also includes the daisy family and others. Goodenia genuflexa is further classified in the genus Goodenia, which is a group of flowering plants that are typically found in the southern regions of Australia. The genus Goodenia is part of the subfamily Goodenioideae, which is a group of flowering plants that are characterized by their unique inflorescences and growth habits. Goodenia genuflexa's classification reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Goodeniaceae family.
